Name: Barbell Bench Press
Description: Set feet flat and shoulder blades pulled back, lower the bar to mid-chest with elbows about 45 degrees, then press up while keeping wrists stacked and glutes on the bench.

Name: Dumbbell Bench Press
Description: Plant feet, keep shoulder blades pinned, lower dumbbells under control to chest level, and press up evenly without letting wrists bend back or elbows flare hard.

Name: Incline Dumbbell Press
Description: Set bench at 30-45 degrees, brace core, lower dumbbells to upper-chest line with forearms vertical, then press smoothly without arching your lower back.

Name: Chest Fly (Dumbbell)
Description: Keep a slight elbow bend, open arms in a wide arc until chest feels a stretch, then squeeze back up with control while shoulders stay down and back.

Name: Push-Ups
Description: Start in a straight plank, lower chest between hands with elbows angled back, and press up while keeping hips level, neck neutral, and core tight.

Name: Cable Chest Fly
Description: Stand staggered and braced, bring handles together in a hugging arc, pause at center, and return slowly without shrugging or overextending shoulders.

Name: Pull-Ups
Description: Hang with active shoulders, brace core, pull elbows toward ribs until chin clears the bar, and lower fully under control without swinging or kipping.

Name: Lat Pulldown
Description: Sit tall with chest up, pull bar to upper chest by driving elbows down, and return slowly to full stretch without leaning far back or yanking.

Name: Barbell Row
Description: Hinge at hips with flat back, keep bar close, row toward lower ribs, and lower under control while maintaining a fixed torso and braced core.

Name: Dumbbell Row
Description: Support your torso, keep spine neutral, pull elbow toward hip, and lower slowly while avoiding torso twist or shoulder shrug on each rep.

Name: Seated Cable Row
Description: Sit tall with slight knee bend, pull handle to lower ribs by squeezing shoulder blades, then extend arms smoothly without rounding your back.

Name: Face Pull
Description: Set cable at face height, pull rope toward nose with elbows high, rotate hands outward, and control the return while keeping ribs down.

Name: T-Bar Row
Description: Hinge with neutral spine and soft knees, pull handle to chest by driving elbows back, and lower with control without jerking from the lower back.

Name: Inverted Row
Description: Keep body in a straight line, pull chest to bar by retracting shoulder blades, and lower fully with control without hips sagging.

Name: Overhead Barbell Press
Description: Start with bar at upper chest, squeeze glutes and core, press straight overhead so biceps finish by ears, and lower under control without leaning back.

Name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
Description: Sit or stand tall, press dumbbells overhead on a vertical path, and lower to shoulder level while keeping wrists neutral and core braced.

Name: Lateral Raises
Description: Raise arms out to shoulder height with soft elbows and thumbs slightly up, then lower slowly while keeping traps relaxed and torso still.

Name: Front Raises
Description: Lift weight to shoulder height with controlled tempo, keep ribs down and elbows soft, and avoid using body swing to start reps.

Name: Rear Delt Fly
Description: Hinge with flat back, raise arms out and slightly back from shoulders, pause briefly, and lower slowly without neck tension or momentum.

Name: Arnold Press
Description: Start palms facing in at chin level, rotate and press overhead in one smooth path, then reverse slowly while keeping core tight and back neutral.

Name: Barbell Curl
Description: Stand tall with elbows near sides, curl bar without swinging, squeeze at top, and lower fully under control while keeping wrists straight.

Name: Dumbbell Curl
Description: Keep shoulders down and elbows fixed, curl with palms rotating up, and lower slowly to full extension without leaning back.

Name: Hammer Curl
Description: Hold neutral grip, curl by bending elbows only, and lower with control while keeping upper arms still and posture upright.

Name: Preacher Curl
Description: Set upper arms firmly on pad, curl through full range without lifting elbows, and lower slowly to maintain constant tension and joint control.

Name: Tricep Dips
Description: Grip bars with shoulders down, lower until elbows reach about 90 degrees, then press up without locking hard or letting shoulders roll forward.

Name: Skull Crushers
Description: Keep upper arms mostly vertical, bend elbows to lower weight near forehead, and extend back up smoothly without flaring elbows wide.

Name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
Description: Pin elbows to sides, press handle down until arms are straight, pause briefly, and return slowly without shoulder movement or torso sway.

Name: Overhead Tricep Extension
Description: Keep elbows pointed forward, lower weight behind head with control, and extend up while bracing core and avoiding lower-back arch.

Name: Barbell Squat
Description: Set bar across upper back, brace and sit down between hips with knees tracking toes, then drive up through mid-foot while keeping chest and spine stable.

Name: Goblet Squat
Description: Hold weight at chest, keep heels down and torso tall, descend until hips are below or near knee level, then stand by pushing knees out and hips through.

Name: Leg Press
Description: Place feet shoulder-width on platform, lower sled until knees are deeply bent but controlled, and press up without locking knees or lifting hips.

Name: Walking Lunges
Description: Step long enough for both knees to bend about 90 degrees, keep torso upright, and push through front heel to move forward under control.

Name: Bulgarian Split Squat
Description: Set rear foot on bench, keep front knee tracking over toes, lower straight down with slight forward torso lean, and drive up through front leg.

Name: Step-Ups
Description: Place full foot on box, lean slightly forward, drive through lead heel to stand tall, and step down softly without pushing off trailing leg.

Name: Jump Squats
Description: Squat with knees aligned over toes, explode upward with full hip extension, and land softly into the next rep with controlled knee and hip bend.

Name: Wall Sit
Description: Slide down until knees are near 90 degrees, keep back and head against wall, and hold with even foot pressure and steady breathing.

Name: Romanian Deadlift
Description: Hinge hips back with soft knees, keep bar close to thighs and spine neutral, lower until hamstrings stretch, then drive hips forward to stand.

Name: Conventional Deadlift
Description: Set bar over mid-foot, brace, pull slack from bar, and stand by pushing floor away while keeping bar close and back neutral throughout.

Name: Hip Thrust
Description: Rest upper back on bench, tuck chin slightly, drive through heels to lift hips until torso is parallel, then lower under control without overarching.

Name: Hamstring Curl
Description: Align knees with machine pivot, curl pad toward glutes without lifting hips, and lower slowly to full extension for controlled reps.

Name: Glute Bridge
Description: Lie with feet hip-width and close to glutes, brace core, lift hips by squeezing glutes, and lower slowly without letting knees cave inward.

Name: Kettlebell Swing
Description: Hinge not squat, hike bell back, snap hips forward to chest height, and let bell return naturally while keeping back flat and shoulders packed.

Name: Plank
Description: Stack shoulders over elbows, squeeze glutes and abs, keep body straight from head to heels, and breathe steadily without hips dropping or piking.

Name: Side Plank
Description: Elbow under shoulder, hips lifted in one straight line, and hold while keeping neck neutral and top shoulder stacked over bottom shoulder.

Name: Bicycle Crunch
Description: Keep low back lightly pressed down, rotate ribcage to opposite knee, and move slowly with full exhale each twist instead of pulling on neck.

Name: Leg Raises
Description: Keep lower back anchored, raise legs with controlled tempo, and lower only as far as you can maintain core tension without arching.

Name: Russian Twist
Description: Sit tall with slight lean, brace core, rotate torso side to side from ribs, and keep movement controlled without rounding lower back.

Name: Hanging Leg Raise
Description: Start from active hang, brace and lift legs by tilting pelvis up, pause briefly, and lower slowly without swinging.

Name: Ab Wheel Rollout
Description: Brace abs and glutes, roll forward while keeping ribs tucked and back neutral, then pull back using core without letting hips sag.

Name: Mountain Climbers
Description: Start in strong plank, drive one knee at a time toward chest, and keep shoulders stacked and hips level at a smooth, quick pace.

Name: Burpees
Description: Squat to floor with neutral spine, jump feet back to plank, return feet under hips, and jump up softly while keeping reps controlled.

Name: Jump Rope
Description: Keep elbows close and rotate rope from wrists, jump low on balls of feet, and land softly with relaxed shoulders and steady rhythm.

Name: High Knees
Description: Run tall with quick contacts, drive knees to hip height, pump arms naturally, and land under hips to reduce impact stress.

Name: Sprint Intervals
Description: Warm up well, keep slight forward lean and active arm drive during sprints, then walk or jog recovery while maintaining clean mechanics.

Name: Rowing Machine
Description: Sequence each stroke legs then hips then arms, return arms then hips then legs, and keep spine long without rounding at the catch.

Name: Treadmill Run
Description: Run tall with slight forward lean from ankles, land under center of mass, and keep cadence steady without overstriding.

Name: Cycling
Description: Set saddle for slight knee bend at bottom stroke, keep core engaged and shoulders relaxed, and pedal in smooth circles with stable hips.

Name: Stair Climber
Description: Stand upright with light hand support, place full foot on each step, and drive through heel while keeping knees aligned and pace consistent.

Name: Battle Ropes
Description: Set athletic stance with soft knees, brace core, create waves from shoulders and arms together, and keep spine neutral as tempo rises.

Name: Medicine Ball Slams
Description: Lift ball overhead with ribs down, slam by hinging and driving arms down forcefully, then catch safely with bent knees and neutral back.

Name: Farmer's Carry
Description: Stand tall with weights at sides, pack shoulders down, take short controlled steps, and keep core braced without leaning or shrugging.

Name: Sled Push
Description: Lean slightly into sled with straight line from head to heel, drive knees forward in quick steps, and keep core tight throughout push.

Name: Box Jumps
Description: Use a quarter squat, swing arms and jump with both feet, land softly in athletic stance, then step down to reduce impact fatigue.

Name: Agility Ladder Drills
Description: Stay on balls of feet with slight knee bend, use quick precise steps, and keep torso quiet while increasing speed gradually.

Name: Tire Flips
Description: Set hips low with flat back, drive through legs to lift tire, then transition hands to push it over while keeping core braced.

Name: Dynamic Stretch Circuit
Description: Move joints through controlled full ranges, keep breathing steady, and avoid bouncing or forcing end ranges during each drill.

Name: Foam Rolling
Description: Roll slowly over tight areas, pause on tender spots for 20-30 seconds, and breathe deeply without rolling directly over joints.

Name: Hip Flexor Stretch
Description: From half-kneel, tuck pelvis slightly and squeeze rear glute, then shift forward gently until front hip stretches without lower-back arch.

Name: Hamstring Stretch
Description: Keep spine long and hinge at hips toward straight leg, stop at mild tension, and breathe slowly without rounding aggressively.

Name: Shoulder Mobility Band Work
Description: Use light band tension, move shoulders through pain-free range with controlled tempo, and keep ribs down to avoid compensating through the back.

Name: Pec Deck
Description: Set seat so handles align with mid-chest, keep elbows slightly bent, bring arms together smoothly, and return slowly without shoulder shrugging.

Name: Assisted Pull-Up
Description: Use enough assistance for full range, start from active hang, pull chest toward bar with elbows down, and lower under control each rep.

Name: Smith Machine Squat
Description: Set feet slightly ahead of bar path, brace core, squat to controlled depth with knees tracking toes, and stand without collapsing inward.

Name: Leg Extension
Description: Align knee joint with machine pivot, extend legs to near straight, pause briefly, and lower slowly without swinging or snapping knees.

Name: Calf Raises
Description: Press through big toe and ball of foot to rise fully, pause at top, and lower through full stretch with controlled ankle alignment.

Name: Cable Woodchopper
Description: Rotate through torso and hips together, keep arms mostly extended, and control both pull and return without twisting the lower back aggressively.

Name: Power Clean
Description: Set neutral spine, push from legs, keep bar close through explosive hip extension, and catch on shoulders with elbows high and stable feet.

Name: Snatch
Description: Start with wide grip and braced trunk, drive powerfully through hips, pull under fast, and receive overhead with locked elbows and stable core.

Name: Push Press
Description: Dip straight down with upright torso, drive through legs to launch bar, then press to lockout while keeping ribs down and head through.

Name: Depth Jumps
Description: Step off box under control, absorb landing with hips and knees aligned, then rebound quickly upward with minimal ground contact and soft mechanics.
